transcription_in_metadata: Transcription text is stored on this file.
linked_note_description: A note was created from this recording. Open it to edit or search.
keyboard_hints_audio: Space: Play/Pause • M: Mute • ←/→: Skip • ↑/↓: Volume
keyboard_hints_video: Space: Play/Pause • F: Fullscreen • M: Mute • ←/→: Skip • ,/.: Frame
playback_failed_generic: Could not play this media file.
playback_error_decode: The media file could not be decoded.
playback_error_not_supported: This media format is not supported.
speaker: Speaker
transcript_empty_hint: No transcript yet. Use “Transcribe to note” to generate a structured transcript with timestamps.
diarization_heuristic_hint: Speaker turns are estimated from pauses in the audio, not true diarization. Rename speakers below to match real people.
dock_system_hint: Select the meeting window or screen with audio. On macOS, system audio may require additional permissions.
dock_screen_denied_mac: Screen or audio capture was blocked. On macOS: System Settings → Privacy & Security → Screen Recording — enable Dome, then restart the app if needed.
dock_no_system_audio_track: No audio track from this source. Pick the app window that plays sound (e.g. Meet/Zoom), or use BlackHole / loopback on macOS for system-wide audio.
dock_two_modes_hint: Three options: microphone only, window/screen audio only, or both mixed together (your voice plus the call or media).
dock_mic_system_explain: Mixes your microphone with the audio from the window or screen you selected above. Pick the meeting or player window first, then start.
dock_mic_only_explain: Only your voice from the microphone. Does not include meeting, browser or system audio.
dock_system_capture_explain: Captures sound from the window or screen you pick (Meet, Zoom, browser tab, etc.). Choose the right window in the list, then start.
dock_connecting_system_hint: If macOS asks for permission, allow screen recording. Use Cancel below to abort.
dock_perm_screen_denied: Screen Recording permission is denied. Grant it in System Preferences and restart Dome.
dock_silent_audio_warning: Audio appears silent. Make sure Screen Recording is granted and restart the app.
dock_no_capture_sources: No windows or screens found. Try refresh.
transcript_status_failed: Transcription failed for this file. You can try again or check settings.
transcript_follow_playback_hint: While playing, scroll keeps the current line in view
transcript_editorial_hint: Search highlights matches. Rename speakers above to suit your notes.
